title: American universities in Middle East brace for Iranian retaliation
summary_full: After the U.S.-Israeli campaign struck Iranian universities, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps called American schools in the Middle East “legitimate targets.”
summary_public: After the U.S.-Israeli campaign struck Iranian universities, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps called American schools in the Middle East “legitimate targets.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps called American schools... legitimate targets.
